title: SOLID, Code Smells, and Evidence-Driven Refactoring · Independent Program Trial
summary: Evolve a growing circulation system without changing its verified external behavior. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a refactored maintainable service with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign responsibilities by cohesive reason to change rather than forcing one method or one field per class.
Create extension points around observed stable variation without prebuilding speculative plugin systems.
Expose small client-specific roles so consumers do not depend on operations they cannot or should not use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
